title: Ender Trails
description: Restores a forgotten feature where endermen leave a trail when they teleport. Also fixes the dragon egg trail being completely wrong.
body:
![Left vanilla, right mod. Vanilla enderman has no trail, mod has enderman trail.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d8e73460e003f059c84eab575026a5e1ad72556.png) 
> [MC-258347 - Enderman's teleport no longer creates an extra trail of particles](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-258347)

Broken since release 1.3, endermen used to subtly visualize where they teleported to with a trail of portal particles. It only worked in singleplayer then, but this mod restores that feature for every player on the server.
## 
![Left is vanilla, right is mod. Vanilla egg has arbitrary particles, mod egg has properly trailed particles.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae79ca521b2c7f86efab9865432771cdd2ec2f1f.png)
> [MC-2157 - Particles emitted from dragon egg when teleporting are not pointing in the correct direction](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-2157)

Also broken since release 1.3, the dragon egg particles. It has a trail, but the trail doesn't actually follow the egg and just points to a random block. This mod corrects the trail to follow the egg for everyone on the server. 
## Usage
Mod requires no setup, put it in your /mods folder for the respective version and it runs out of the box. There is an optional configuration to toggle the fixes on/off if need be.

> This mod is **server sided**
- Will work for all clients connected to a server with this mod
- Will work for all clients on LAN and P2P servers
- Will work in singleplayer
- Will **NOT** work on servers that don't have the mod installed
